blended.narrative: Arapahoe Basin is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 5.5 inches of dry powder expected. Snow levels around 6,046 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 6 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 5" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 2.4" of new snow over the past week. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 35".
